summary: Tested Luna Group VIP mobile app features: Live Auctions carousel on home page, Auctions page via SEE ALL, Active Auctions on venue pages, Profile tab with Birthday Club access, and Birthday Club page. All features working correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: Live Auctions carousel correctly implemented in index.tsx with horizontal ScrollView, LIVE badge, title, venue, and current bid
SectionTitle component with SEE ALL link correctly navigates to /auctions page
Auctions page (auctions.tsx) shows ACTIVE NOW section with auction cards including timers
Venue page (venue/[id].tsx) correctly shows Active Auctions section when venue has auctions
Profile tab layout (_layout.tsx) correctly checks for birthday rewards and conditionally shows badge
Birthday Club page (birthday-club.tsx) shows birthday countdown, rewards list, and HOW IT WORKS section
context_for_next_testing_agent: All requested features verified working: Live Auctions carousel on home page with LIVE badge, title, venue, current bid; SEE ALL navigates to Auctions page; Auctions page shows ACTIVE NOW with timers; Venue page shows Active Auctions section; Profile has Birthday Club quick action; Birthday Club page shows countdown and rewards list.

mocked_apis.CherryHub: MOCKED - CherryHub membership API uses mock mode due to DNS issues

live_auctions_carousel.details: Home page shows 'LIVE AUCTIONS' section with horizontal ScrollView, auction cards with LIVE badge, title, venue name, and current bid amount

see_all_navigation.details: Clicking 'SEE ALL' on Live Auctions navigates to dedicated Auctions page (/auctions)

auctions_page.details: Auctions page shows 'ACTIVE NOW' section with auction cards including countdown timers (e.g., '2h 34m 47s'), venue name, title, current bid, and feature tags

venue_active_auctions.details: Eclipse venue page shows 'Active Auctions' section when venue has active auctions

profile_birthday_badge.details: Profile tab layout checks for unclaimed birthday rewards via getBirthdayStatus API and conditionally shows pink dot badge. Test user's birthday is 352 days away so no badge currently shown (expected behavior)

birthday_club_access.details: Birthday Club accessible from Profile page Quick Actions grid

birthday_club_page.details: Birthday Club page shows birthday countdown ('Your birthday is in 352 days!'), YOUR BIRTHDAY REWARDS section with locked rewards (Free Entry, Free Drink, 250 Bonus Points, 2x Points Week), CLAIMED REWARDS section, and HOW IT WORKS section

bottom_navigation.details: 5 tabs visible: Tonight, Venues, Luna AI, Wallet, Profile

test_notes.birthday_badge_behavior: The birthday badge only shows when getBirthdayStatus returns unclaimed rewards. Test user's birthday is 352 days away, so there are no unclaimed rewards to trigger the badge - this is expected behavior as documented in the review request.
